acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Evidence records the relevant workspace mutation baseline cluster for compositor identity/status accessors.
Focused tests cover OutputId, WorkspaceId, SessionId, and OutputStatus workspace behavior.
Targeted mutation checks are clean for compositor identity and status accessors.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: ids.rs: 12 mutants tested, 7 caught, 5 unviable; status.rs: 19 mutants tested, 3 caught, 16 unviable; no missed mutants and no timeouts.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No transport, product QUIC, capture, encode, Apple, Nix, or supply-chain claim is changed.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: git diff is limited to crates/compositor/src/ids.rs, crates/compositor/src/status.rs, plus node evidence and reports

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node hardens pure compositor accessor unit coverage only.
